reason: Tag 'communication' is not in the frozen list. Replaced with 'culture' (written characters are a cultural artifact); 'education' retained.
Tag 'object_home' is semantically inappropriate for a ticket. Replaced with 'transaction' (tickets are bought/exchanged); 'transport_travel' retained.
Slash '/' in meaning_en is inconsistent with the semicolon convention used throughout the batch. Reformatted for consistency.
object_home is factually wrong for an admission ticket (a venue/event pass, not a household object); corrected to transaction + commerce_trade
object_home is factually wrong for a transport ticket; replaced with transaction to reflect that a ticket is a purchased document, not a home object
action_communication is wrong for a purely receptive/perceptual verb (to hear = receive sound, not send/communicate); dropped, leaving perception alone
greeting is wrong; 没事儿 is a reassurance or dismissal (never mind / it's nothing), not a greeting like 你好 or 再见; replaced greeting with attitude
Tag 'communication' is not in the frozen list; closest valid tag is 'action_communication'.
meaning_en 'text (lesson)' is a near-transliteration of meaning_ru 'текст (урока)' — zero complementarity. En should convey a different angle of the same concept.
meaning_ru was 29 chars ('благополучный; цел и невредим'), exceeding the 28-char button-fit limit. 'невредимый' (unharmed) captures the same shade as 'цел и невредим' in fewer characters.
meaning_ru was 30 chars ('парковаться; остановить машину'), exceeding the 28-char limit. 'авто' replaces 'машину' to save two characters while preserving identical meaning.

Complementarity failure: meaning_ru 'дарить (кому-то)' and meaning_en 'to give as a gift' express the same sense in two languages. Cedict lists 'to send' as a co-primary sense. The new en adds the send/deliver nuance absent from the Russian, so the pair triangulates instead of mirrors.
是 in 老是 is 4th tone (shì), not neutral; the authored pinyin 'lǎoshi' is missing the tone mark on the second syllable.
旅客 means traveler/tourist (cedict: 'traveler; tourist'); 'passenger' (пассажир) is the meaning of 乘客, not 旅客. Both ru and en incorrectly included the 'passenger' sense.
time_word is a grammatical/temporal category (adverbs, time expressions); a wristwatch is a physical object, not a time word. Removed time_word tag.
The authored 'notes; jot down' mixes noun and verb phrase; meaning_ru is purely noun-form (записи; конспект). Corrected to noun 'notes; jottings' to match part-of-speech and cedict primary sense.
Cedict specifies 'Chinese New Year'; omitting 'Chinese' in both fields risks confusion with Western New Year (Jan 1). meaning_ru trimmed to noun form to fit within 28 chars.
西 means Western broadly (incl. American, Australian etc.), not just European. Cedict says 'Western-style food'; европейская кухня is too narrow.
会 in 一会儿 is 4th tone (huì), not 3rd tone (huǐ) as authored.
Tag 'communication' is not in the frozen list. 'communication_formal' fits pronunciation as a formal phonological/linguistic concept.
Tag 'communication' is not in the frozen list. 'action_learning' better captures the activity of learning new vocabulary.
Tag 'communication' is not in the frozen list. 'action_communication' is the correct frozen tag for telling or sharing jokes.
object_home is wrong for a bank card; replaced with money which fits both senses (bank card / ATM card).
ужасно carries a negative register that 极了 does not have; it is a neutral intensifier. Changed to очень.
ha-ha (laughter) is a transliteration of ха-ха (смех), violating the complementarity rule. Changed en to the semantic gloss from cedict.
играть; исполнять (на сцене) is 29 chars, over the 28-char limit. Trimmed by removing the parenthetical; sense is preserved.
Second syllable ān is vowel-initial and requires an apostrophe per pinyin rules; bǎoān → bǎo'ān
Original RU 'доноситься; приходить (о вестях)' is 32 chars, exceeding the ~28-char button-fit limit; trimmed by dropping the parenthetical
object_home is a poor fit for an ID card; law_admin_doc alone covers the meaning precisely
'correspond' used as a noun label is grammatically awkward; 'correspondence' is the correct noun form and matches the verb/noun duality of the entry
process_change does not fit a mental forecasting/estimating verb; cognition alone is accurate
object_home is wrong for a gold medal; sport is the only relevant tag here
food tag is inaccurate alongside drink; cola is a beverage, not food — drop food
building is wrong for 初中, which is an educational level/period, not a physical structure
верхняя одежда in Russian primarily means outerwear/overcoat, misleading for 上衣 which is any upper-body garment (shirt, blouse, jacket); trimmed to reflect the actual range
работать (to work) is too vague and misses the core sense of opening/starting a business; fixed to reflect CEDict open-a-business meaning
добровольно is an adverb (voluntarily) — wrong part of speech; replaced with добровольчество (volunteerism/volunteering) to match the verb sense to volunteer
object_home is inaccurate for a postage stamp; object_stationery fits the postal/written-communication context
law_admin_doc is for documents/paperwork; traffic police are law-enforcement personnel — law_justice is the correct tag
meaning_en is 18 chars — fine, but trailing '; fare' is a second sense. Both senses are primary and the authored form already matches cedict. No change needed — actually this is fine.

cedict_en lists two equally prominent primary senses: 'first day of a lunar month' AND 'first year in junior middle school'. The authored card picks only the lunar-date sense. At HSK-3 both are common; the school-year sense is arguably more encountered in daily life. Flagging to newflags rather than silently picking one.

cedict_en for 老头儿 points to 老头子, not a direct definition. Dataset_meanings only says 'see 老头子'. The card's ru/en ('старик (разг.)' / 'old man (coll.)') is the correct colloquial meaning and commonly attested, so sense is fine. No change needed.

The second cedict sense 'unboiled water' is equally important and culturally salient in Chinese (drinking unboiled water is a distinct concept). The authored en 'cool water' misses this. Trim to fit: 'cool; unboiled water' (21 chars).
meaning_ru 'послезавтрашний год' is wrong: послезавтра = the day after tomorrow. The word for 'year after next' in Russian is 'через два года' or the calque form. Correct: 'год через два'.

meaning_ru '(сч. сл. стихи/песни)' — abbreviation 'сч. сл.' is non-standard for a learner card; acceptable if house style, but 'стихи/песни' alone with context is fine. However meaning_ru total is 'глава; первый; (сч. сл. стихи/песни)' = 35 chars, over the 28-char limit. Trim needed.
meaning_ru 'ведомство; ситуация; (сч. партия)' = 37 chars, over limit. Trim needed.
meaning_ru 'колесо; чередоваться; (сч. круг)' = 34 chars, over limit. Trim to fit.
meaning_ru 'блюдо; тарелка; (сч. блюдо)' = 29 chars, marginally over. Also 'сч. блюдо' repeats 'блюдо' from the noun. Trim and deduplicate.

Pinyin is 'jiē' but the core senses 'knot / to tie / to bind' belong to the reading jiē only in the sense of fruit-bearing (植物结果). The meanings 'knot, to tie, to bind' are read jiē as well but more precisely the dominant HSK reading for 'tie/knot' is jié (声调2). The authored pinyin 'jiē' (tone 1) is the 'bear fruit' reading. The authored meanings 'to tie; knot' belong to jié (tone 2). This is a tone error.
meaning_en 'to give; to pay' underdescribes the primary nuance: 付出 specifically means to expend/invest effort, not just 'to give' generically. Better: 'to expend; to invest'.
Pinyin 'tiāo' (tone 1) means 'to carry on a shoulder pole / to poke / to stir up'. The authored meanings 'to pick; to choose' belong to tiǎo (tone 3). This is a tone error.
Missing leading 'to' — all other verb entries use 'to + verb' form; corrected for consistency.
яшма (jasper) is a different mineral from jade; 玉 covers nephrite (нефрит) and jadeite (жадеит), not jasper
action_movement implies locomotion; 打败 is a competitive/combat action, so physical_action fits far better
body_state is for physical states (hungry, tired, etc.); 泪 is a noun (tears), and emotion triangulates its primary usage context better

meaning_ru is 30 chars (over limit). 'голос. сообщение' uses an unclear abbreviation for голосовое сообщение; trimming to 'произношение; голос' (19 chars) stays within limit and covers both the linguistic and tech senses. The existing meaning_en 'pronunciation; voice' triangulates the voice-message angle.
meaning_ru is 31 chars (over limit). 'дядя (старший); почт. обращение' trimmed to 'дядя; почтит. обращение' (23 chars) preserves both core senses — family term and respectful form of address.
Tag 'action_communication' is wrong — winning an award is an event/achievement, not an act of communication. 'event_situation' fits the cedict sense 'to win an award'.

meaning_en 'promote sales; promotion' mixes a verbal phrase with a noun, inconsistent with the verbal cedict definition 'to promote sales' and the verbal meaning_ru 'стимулировать сбыт'. Fixed to 'to promote sales' (16 chars).
Parallel verb forms: 'praise' should be 'to praise' to match 'to admire'.

'туристический' is a dangling adjective without a noun — reads as 'tourist' with no referent. Replaced with 'большой автобус; автобус' which directly maps to cedict 'large bus/coach' and fits the button.
meaning_ru was 29 chars (1 over limit); trimmed 'поправлять здоровье' to 'поправляться' — same sense, within limit
en 'to dance; dance' repeats the same concept (infinitive + bare noun of same root) — not complementary; corrected to add cedict's secondary sense 'to wield'
pinyin 'dā' (1st tone, da1) is the bound-form reading used only in 答应/答理; the stated meaning 'to answer; respond' belongs to dá (2nd tone, da2)
action_daily is inappropriate for suicide; removed it. health_medical alone is the correct tag.
action_communication does not fit 'to punish/fine'; communication is not involved. Removed it, keeping law_justice only.
action_movement is wrong — seeking/looking for something is abstract, not physical movement. Removed it, keeping cognition only.
law_admin_doc is too specific/formal for this everyday prohibition expression. Removed it, keeping judgement only.

BUTTON-FIT + COMPLEMENTARITY: 'Chinese inch' is fine but redundant with 'cun'; swapping to 'unit of length' is more informative and avoids re-labelling. Also meaning_ru 'цунь (мера длины)' is 18 chars — fine; en side trimmed to remove tautology.

SENSE + BUTTON-FIT: the primary sense at this HSK level is 'to earn/make (money)'. 'Зарабатывать (деньги)' adds parenthetical that pushes length; trimming keeps it clean. En side kept short and complementary.

COMPLEMENTARITY: meaning_ru mixes noun (догадка) and verb (предполагать) inconsistently. Both en and ru should be parallel. Correcting ru to verb form or noun form; ru corrected to verb-first form for parallelism with en.

COMPLEMENTARITY: ru must be grammatically parallel — cedict gives 'to guess / to conjecture / to surmise', all verbs. 'Догадка' (noun) mixed with 'предполагать' (verb) is inconsistent. Corrected to two verbs.
BUTTON-FIT: meaning_ru 'ранний период; начальная стадия' is 29 chars (1 over). Trim meaning_en to reinforce complementarity without redundancy. Also meaning_ru can be trimmed slightly.
BUTTON-FIT + COMPLEMENTARITY: 'начальная стадия' (initial stage) diverges from cedict 'early stage'; aligning to 'ранняя стадия' keeps both fields parallel and accurate. 29 chars now 28.
TAGS: tag 'food' is wrong here — 餐馆 is a place (a restaurant building), not a food item. Replace 'food' with 'place' which is in the frozen list and fits.
communication_emotion removed: 愁 is a purely internal state of worry/sadness, not a communicative act. emotion alone is sufficient.
transport_travel removed: 停留 means to stay/linger somewhere and is not transport-specific. action_daily added as the more accurate second tag.
action_daily removed: violating rules is a legal/regulatory concept, not routine daily activity. law_justice added as a more appropriate second tag.
object_tech removed: 铃声 is a sound, not a tech object. sensation added as the fitting second tag for an auditory percept.
Original meaning_ru 'подвергнуть; произвести (действие)' is 35 chars, exceeds 28-char limit. Trimmed to fit while preserving core sense.
'favors' is too informal and weak compared to cedict 'to be advantageous to / beneficial for'; replaced with 'advantageous' for a cleaner triangulation.
Abbreviation 'преим.' is cryptic on a flashcard; expanded to 'главным образом' (predominantly/mainly), which matches cedict 'to rely mainly on' and fits within 28 chars.
ехать на машине (go by car) is too narrow — 乘车 covers any vehicle (bus, train, car). ехать на транспорте is accurate and within 28 chars.
building tag is wrong for a cupboard/cabinet (furniture, not a structure). Drop it; object_home is sufficient.
meaning_ru is 34 chars (over limit). Trimmed to 23 chars while preserving the core sense of willingness to give/spend.
meaning_en is 32 chars (over limit). Trimmed to 21 chars; slash form retains both the military and civilian delegation senses.
meaning_en is 29 chars (over limit). Primary practical sense at HSK5 is 物业管理 (property management); trimmed to 19 chars.
Missing 'to' verb marker — cedict gives 'to enroll new students'. Verb form required for consistency.
Missing 'to' verb marker — cedict gives 'to remit money'. Verb form required for consistency.
Both ru (байцзю) and en (baijiu) used the same transliteration strategy; they don't triangulate. en drops the transliteration to describe the drink, complementing ru's transliteration approach.
object_home is imprecise for a greeting card; object_stationery is in the frozen list and accurately classifies a paper card.
health_medical implies illness; sweating is a normal physical action/body state. physical_action is more accurate as second tag.
CEDICT specifies 'traditional Chinese medicine'; omitting 'traditional' loses the key distinction from 西药 (Western medicine).

meaning_en: to play a role; have effect
reason: Original en 'to play (a role); to have (effect)' is 34 chars, over the 28-char limit. Trimmed to 27 chars while preserving both senses.
'place' and 'location' are redundant tags for the same concept; drop 'location', keep 'place'.
'antivirus' is a noun/adjective but 杀毒 is a verb phrase (to kill/remove viruses). 'remove virus; disinfect' correctly reflects the verbal sense and matches the Russian gloss.
